chunk_id: mineru_book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0363_10
text: 9. Let f (x) be an integer-valued polynomial and let m ∈ Z. We define the polynomial fm(x) = f (x + m). Prove that f (x) and fm(x) are polynomials of the same degree and with the same leading coeficient. Let A(f ) = { f (i)}i=0. Prove that gcd(A(f )) = gcd(A(fm)).
page: book_en_国外数学教材-数论-Melvyn B. Nathanson—Elementary Methods in Number Theory_0363
